headline: Risk-on rip: SPY +1.9%, QQQ +3.4%; Iran deal removes geopolitical premium; ORCL ripples to AVGO/ANET

market_state.line: SPY +1.92% above 50d, QQQ +3.44%, VXX stress 0.98 — tape is clean, low vol suppression; entries favorable but extended intraday.

actions.line: Half size — clean risk/reward, signal agrees; research neutral caps position.
Quarter size — textbook setup, tight stop, but all three advisors low conviction.

watch.line: ORCL capex buildout expands hyperscale networking spend — Tomahawk/custom ASIC tailwind, medium confidence.
Oracle OCI capacity ramp raises 800G switch port demand; Arista is direct beneficiary, medium confidence.
+15.6% on 2.46x rel vol — highest volume confirmation of the day's movers; watch for continuation or fade.
+28.6% top mover on 1.7x vol with MACD bullish cross — no desk take, but leading the tape.
Oracle capex tightens DC supply; DLR leases capacity to ORCL and benefits from hyperscaler spillover demand.

changed: FRO and MRVL desk takes dropped; HBAN added as new quarter-size long
ORCL catalyst persists but ripple set shifted — AMZN/SNOW/NVDA out, AVGO/ANET/DLR in
Iran deal headline adds macro risk-on tailwind not present last scan
caveats: RTH scan as of 15:39 ET — prices are ~21 min from close; fills near entry levels may not be available into the bell.
ORCL ripple calls (AVGO, ANET, DLR) are medium confidence only — no desk take issued; do not promote to action.
